_source: NCSL, IAPP, Wikipedia — compiled from multiple public sources on US state privacy legislation
_note: Key US privacy and tech legislation milestones providing context for IL lobbying activity. Content rephrased for compliance.

national_milestones.event: Illinois BIPA (Biometric Information Privacy Act) enacted — first US biometric privacy law
EU GDPR adopted (effective May 2018) — triggered global privacy legislation wave
Congress repealed FCC broadband privacy rules (S.J.Res.34)
FCC voted to repeal net neutrality (Restoring Internet Freedom Order)
Cambridge Analytica scandal broke — accelerated privacy legislation
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) signed into law
US Supreme Court: South Dakota v. Wayfair — states can tax online sales
Illinois BIPA lawsuits surged after Rosenbach v. Six Flags ruling
Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act signed

illinois_specific.event: IL 100th General Assembly convened — surge in privacy bills
HB2411 (Biometric Data Commercial Use) introduced — IA opposed
IL Supreme Court: Rosenbach v. Six Flags — no actual injury needed for BIPA claims
IL enacted marketplace facilitator tax law (SB0119)
IL 102nd General Assembly — continued privacy and tech regulation push
